title: viola lactea var. stricta
intro: Viola lactea var. stricta, also known as the white violet, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. Viola lactea var. stricta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
